title: China presses Iran against resuming war, urges Hormuz reopening ahead of Trump-Xi summit
summary_full: China called for a "prompt resumption of shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz," though that point was absent in Iran's statement.
summary_public: China called for a "prompt resumption of shipping traffic through the Strait of Hormuz," though that point was absent in Iran's statement.
